requirement_topic.en: EMC Directive 2014/30/EU — Emissions and Immunity for GaN Fast Chargers / USB-C Adapters (Multimedia/ICT Equipment Route)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC指令2014/30/EU——GaN快速充电器/USB-C适配器的发射与抗扰度要求（多媒体/ICT设备路径）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC指令2014/30/EU——GaN快速充電器/USB-C適配器的發射與抗擾度要求（多媒體/ICT設備路徑）

summary.en: GaN fast chargers and USB-C power adapters placed on the EU market as standalone power supply units or accessories to multimedia/ICT equipment are subject to the essential requirements of EMC Directive 2014/30/EU (OJ L 96, 29.3.2014): the equipment shall not generate electromagnetic disturbance exceeding levels that prevent radio and telecommunications equipment from functioning as intended, and shall have adequate immunity to electromagnetic disturbance to operate as intended. Manufacturers self-declare conformity via an EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC) and affix CE marking. The primary harmonised standards for multimedia and ICT equipment are: EN 55032:2015/A11:2020 (emissions — conducted and radiated, based on CISPR 32:2015) and EN 55035:2017/A11:2020 (immunity — based on CISPR 35:2016), which together cover the emission limits and immunity test requirements for multimedia equipment including external power supplies. For harmonic current emissions (input current up to 16 A per phase), EN IEC 61000-3-2:2019/A1:2021 (based on IEC 61000-3-2:2018+AMD1:2020) applies and is a harmonised standard under 2014/30/EU. EN IEC 61000-3-3:2013/A2:2021 covers voltage fluctuations and flicker for equipment with rated current up to 16 A per phase. These harmonised standards confer a presumption of conformity with the Directive's essential requirements. [UNVERIFIED: the exact OJ citation dates for EN 55032:2015/A11:2020 and EN 55035:2017/A11:2020 under 2014/30/EU should be confirmed against the current EC harmonised standards list at single-market-economy.ec.europa.eu before regulatory submission.]
summary.zh: 作为独立电源或多媒体/ICT设备配件投放欧盟市场的GaN快速充电器和USB-C电源适配器，须符合EMC指令2014/30/EU（欧盟官方公报L 96，2014年3月29日）的基本要求：设备产生的电磁骚扰不得超过妨碍无线电及电信设备正常工作的限值，且须具备足够的电磁抗扰能力以确保预期功能。制造商通过签署EU符合性声明（DoC）并加贴CE标志进行自我声明。针对多媒体和ICT设备的主要协调标准为：EN 55032:2015/A11:2020（发射——传导与辐射，基于CISPR 32:2015）和EN 55035:2017/A11:2020（抗扰度——基于CISPR 35:2016），共同涵盖多媒体设备（含外置电源）的发射限值和抗扰度试验要求。对于谐波电流发射（每相输入电流不超过16 A），EN IEC 61000-3-2:2019/A1:2021（基于IEC 61000-3-2:2018+AMD1:2020）适用，为2014/30/EU下的协调标准。EN IEC 61000-3-3:2013/A2:2021涵盖额定电流不超过16 A每相的设备的电压波动与闪烁。上述协调标准提供符合指令基本要求的推定符合性。【未经核实：EN 55032:2015/A11:2020和EN 55035:2017/A11:2020在2014/30/EU下的官方公报具体引用日期，须在监管提交前对照欧盟委员会协调标准列表（single-market-economy.ec.europa.eu）独立确认。】
summary.zht: 作為獨立電源或多媒體/ICT設備配件投放歐盟市場的GaN快速充電器和USB-C電源適配器，須符合EMC指令2014/30/EU（歐盟官方公報L 96，2014年3月29日）的基本要求：設備產生的電磁騷擾不得超過妨礙無線電及電信設備正常工作的限值，且須具備足夠的電磁抗擾能力以確保預期功能。製造商通過簽署EU符合性聲明（DoC）並加貼CE標誌進行自我聲明。針對多媒體和ICT設備的主要協調標準為：EN 55032:2015/A11:2020（發射——傳導與輻射，基於CISPR 32:2015）和EN 55035:2017/A11:2020（抗擾度——基於CISPR 35:2016），共同涵蓋多媒體設備（含外置電源）的發射限值和抗擾度試驗要求。對於諧波電流發射（每相輸入電流不超過16 A），EN IEC 61000-3-2:2019/A1:2021（基於IEC 61000-3-2:2018+AMD1:2020）適用，為2014/30/EU下的協調標準。EN IEC 61000-3-3:2013/A2:2021涵蓋額定電流不超過16 A每相的設備的電壓波動與閃爍。上述協調標準提供符合指令基本要求的推定符合性。【未經核實：EN 55032:2015/A11:2020和EN 55035:2017/A11:2020在2014/30/EU下的官方公報具體引用日期，須在監管提交前對照歐盟委員會協調標準列表（single-market-economy.ec.europa.eu）獨立確認。】

standards_or_laws: EN 55032:2015/A11:2020 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — Emission requirements (based on CISPR 32:2015; harmonised under 2014/30/EU — verify current OJ citation)
EN 55035:2017/A11:2020 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — Immunity requirements (based on CISPR 35:2016; harmonised under 2014/30/EU — verify current OJ citation)
EN IEC 61000-3-2:2019/A1:2021 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (input current up to 16 A per phase; harmonised under 2014/30/EU)
EN IEC 61000-3-3:2013/A2:2021 — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker (equipment with rated current up to 16 A per phase)

summary.en: China's primary EMC standards for multimedia and ICT equipment — including GaN fast chargers and USB-C adapters — are GB/T 9254.1-2021 (emissions, IDT CISPR 32:2015, recommended) and GB/T 9254.2-2021 (immunity, IDT CISPR 35:2016, recommended), which are the direct Chinese adoptions of the same CISPR base documents as EN 55032 and EN 55035. For harmonic current emissions, GB 17625.1-2022 (mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020) is the CN mandatory equivalent of EN IEC 61000-3-2. A key structural difference is that in China, GB/T 9254.1 and GB/T 9254.2 carry recommended (GB/T) status for most product categories, whereas mandatory EMC enforcement for consumer products is primarily achieved via China Compulsory Certification (CCC) for products in the CCC catalogue, or via SAMR market surveillance enforcement of GB 4343.1-2009 (based on CISPR 14-1:2005, mandatory, for household appliances including power supplies). [UNVERIFIED: whether GaN fast chargers sold as standalone products in China fall under CCC catalogue coverage and which mandatory standard applies — GB 4343.1 (household appliances) or GB/T 9254.1 (multimedia/ICT) — depends on product classification and should be confirmed with SAMR/CNCA before regulatory submission.] For voltage fluctuation and flicker, GB 17625.2-2007 (mandatory, based on IEC 61000-3-3:2005) is the CN parallel to EN IEC 61000-3-3.
summary.zh: 中国针对多媒体和ICT设备（包括GaN快速充电器和USB-C适配器）的主要EMC标准为：GB/T 9254.1-2021（发射，等同CISPR 32:2015，推荐性）和GB/T 9254.2-2021（抗扰度，等同CISPR 35:2016，推荐性），是与EN 55032和EN 55035基础相同的CISPR文件的中国等同采用版本。谐波电流发射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（强制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）是EN IEC 61000-3-2在中国的强制性等效标准。重要结构差异在于：在中国，GB/T 9254.1和GB/T 9254.2对大多数产品类别仅具推荐性（GB/T），而针对消费品的强制性EMC执行主要通过：CCC目录内产品的中国强制认证（CCC），或SAMR市场监管对GB 4343.1-2009（基于CISPR 14-1:2005，强制性，适用于包括电源在内的家用电器）的执法。【未经核实：在中国作为独立产品销售的GaN快速充电器是否纳入CCC目录，以及适用的强制性标准（GB 4343.1家用电器或GB/T 9254.1多媒体/ICT）——取决于产品分类，须在监管提交前向SAMR/CNCA确认。】电压波动与闪烁方面，GB 17625.2-2007（强制性，基于IEC 61000-3-3:2005）是EN IEC 61000-3-3在中国的对应标准。
summary.zht: 中國針對多媒體和ICT設備（包括GaN快速充電器和USB-C適配器）的主要EMC標準為：GB/T 9254.1-2021（發射，等同CISPR 32:2015，推薦性）和GB/T 9254.2-2021（抗擾度，等同CISPR 35:2016，推薦性），是與EN 55032和EN 55035基礎相同的CISPR文件的中國等同採用版本。諧波電流發射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（強制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）是EN IEC 61000-3-2在中國的強制性等效標準。重要結構差異在於：在中國，GB/T 9254.1和GB/T 9254.2對大多數產品類別僅具推薦性（GB/T），而針對消費品的強制性EMC執行主要通過：CCC目錄內產品的中國強制認證（CCC），或SAMR市場監管對GB 4343.1-2009（基於CISPR 14-1:2005，強制性，適用於包括電源在內的家用電器）的執法。【未經核實：在中國作為獨立產品銷售的GaN快速充電器是否納入CCC目錄，以及適用的強制性標準（GB 4343.1家用電器或GB/T 9254.1多媒體/ICT）——取決於產品分類，須在監管提交前向SAMR/CNCA確認。】電壓波動與閃爍方面，GB 17625.2-2007（強制性，基於IEC 61000-3-3:2005）是EN IEC 61000-3-3在中國的對應標準。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — Emission requirements (recommended; IDT CISPR 32:2015)
GB/T 9254.2-2021 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — Immunity requirements (recommended; IDT CISPR 35:2016)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions, input current up to 16 A per phase (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)
GB 17625.2-2007 — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker (mandatory; based on IEC 61000-3-3:2005)

GB 4343.1-2009 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household electrical appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (mandatory; based on CISPR 14-1:2005) [UNVERIFIED: applicability to standalone GaN chargers vs GB/T 9254.1 depends on CN product classification — confirm with SAMR/CNCA]

gap.en: Three gaps exist between Chinese domestic EMC compliance and EU market entry for GaN fast chargers: (1) Mandatory status asymmetry — EN 55032/EN 55035 are harmonised under the legally binding EMC Directive 2014/30/EU and compliance is mandatory for CE marking; the CN equivalents GB/T 9254.1/9254.2 are recommended standards, meaning a Chinese manufacturer may hold no test report to these standards at all, relying instead on CCC certification or voluntary testing only. (2) Re-issuance requirement — even where GB/T 9254.1 test results are technically equivalent to EN 55032, the EU DoC must cite the EN-designated standard and tests must be performed at a laboratory recognised for EU EMC testing (ILAC MRA accreditation); existing CNAS-accredited CN test reports cannot be directly submitted as the basis for a CE DoC without re-issuance. (3) Harmonic standard edition lag — GB 17625.2-2007 is based on IEC 61000-3-3:2005 whereas the EU harmonised edition is EN IEC 61000-3-3:2013/A2:2021; the 2021 amendment updates assessment criteria for equipment with rated current up to 16 A per phase, and methodology differences may affect flicker assessment outcomes between CN and EU reports.
gap.zh: GaN快速充电器从中国国内EMC合规到欧盟市场准入存在三项差距：（1）强制性地位不对称——EN 55032/EN 55035在具有法律约束力的EMC指令2014/30/EU下作为协调标准，CE标志要求强制符合；而中国等效标准GB/T 9254.1/9254.2为推荐性，中国制造商可能根本未持有上述标准的检测报告，仅依赖CCC认证或自愿检测。（2）重新签发要求——即便GB/T 9254.1检测结果在技术上等效于EN 55032，EU符合性声明须引用EN编号标准，且试验须在被EU EMC测试认可（ILAC MRA认可）的实验室进行；现有CNAS认可的中国检测报告不能在未重新签发的情况下直接作为CE符合性声明依据提交。（3）谐波标准版本滞后——GB 17625.2-2007基于IEC 61000-3-3:2005，而EU协调版本为EN IEC 61000-3-3:2013/A2:2021；2021修订件更新了额定电流不超过16 A每相设备的评估准则，方法论差异可能影响中欧报告之间闪烁评估结果。
gap.zht: GaN快速充電器從中國國內EMC合規到歐盟市場準入存在三項差距：（1）強制性地位不對稱——EN 55032/EN 55035在具有法律約束力的EMC指令2014/30/EU下作為協調標準，CE標誌要求強制符合；而中國等效標準GB/T 9254.1/9254.2為推薦性，中國製造商可能根本未持有上述標準的檢測報告，僅依賴CCC認證或自願檢測。（2）重新簽發要求——即便GB/T 9254.1檢測結果在技術上等效於EN 55032，EU符合性聲明須引用EN編號標準，且試驗須在被EU EMC測試認可（ILAC MRA認可）的實驗室進行；現有CNAS認可的中國檢測報告不能在未重新簽發的情況下直接作為CE符合性聲明依據提交。（3）諧波標準版本滯後——GB 17625.2-2007基於IEC 61000-3-3:2005，而EU協調版本為EN IEC 61000-3-3:2013/A2:2021；2021修訂件更新了額定電流不超過16 A每相設備的評估準則，方法論差異可能影響中歐報告之間閃爍評估結果。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for CE marking. The essential requirements of Directive 2014/30/EU are legally binding for placing GaN chargers and USB-C adapters on the EU market. EN 55032, EN 55035, and EN IEC 61000-3-2 are harmonised standards conferring a presumption of conformity.
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 9254.1-2021 and GB/T 9254.2-2021 are recommended (GB/T) — not legally compulsory as standalone requirements for most product categories. GB 17625.1-2022 and GB 17625.2-2007 are mandatory (GB). CCC mandatory certification may apply depending on product classification under the CNCA catalogue. [UNVERIFIED: CCC scope for standalone GaN chargers — confirm with SAMR/CNCA]

compliance_verdict.en: Chinese GaN fast charger manufacturers holding only CN domestic EMC test reports (GB/T 9254.1-2021, GB/T 9254.2-2021, or generic GB harmonic series) cannot reuse those reports for EU CE marking. A dedicated EN 55032 + EN 55035 + EN IEC 61000-3-2 test campaign at an ILAC MRA-accredited laboratory, a new EU DoC citing EN-designated standards, and a Technical File are required. The mandatory-vs-recommended asymmetry means many CN manufacturers may have no formal CISPR 32/35-equivalent test data at all. This comparison is informational only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 仅持有国内EMC检测报告（GB/T 9254.1-2021、GB/T 9254.2-2021或通用GB谐波系列）的中国GaN快速充电器制造商，无法将其复用于欧盟CE标志。须在ILAC MRA认可实验室开展专项EN 55032 + EN 55035 + EN IEC 61000-3-2检测，签发引用EN编号标准的新EU符合性声明，并编制技术文件。强制性与推荐性的不对称意味着许多中国制造商可能根本没有正式的CISPR 32/35等效检测数据。本比较仅供参考，不构成法律或监管建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 僅持有國內EMC檢測報告（GB/T 9254.1-2021、GB/T 9254.2-2021或通用GB諧波系列）的中國GaN快速充電器製造商，無法將其複用於歐盟CE標誌。須在ILAC MRA認可實驗室開展專項EN 55032 + EN 55035 + EN IEC 61000-3-2檢測，簽發引用EN編號標準的新EU符合性聲明，並編製技術文件。強制性與推薦性的不對稱意味著許多中國製造商可能根本沒有正式的CISPR 32/35等效檢測數據。本比較僅供參考，不構成法律或監管建議。

requirement_topic.en: GaN High-Frequency Switching EMI — Design Challenge and EU Compliance Implications
requirement_topic.zh: GaN高频开关EMI——设计挑战与欧盟合规影响
requirement_topic.zht: GaN高頻開關EMI——設計挑戰與歐盟合規影響

summary.en: GaN (gallium nitride) transistors switch at significantly higher frequencies (typically 100 kHz to several MHz) and with steeper dV/dt and dI/dt slew rates than conventional silicon MOSFETs, inherently generating broadband conducted and radiated EMI at frequencies that extend well into the EN 55032 measurement range (conducted: 150 kHz to 30 MHz; radiated: 30 MHz to 1 GHz). The EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU requires that GaN fast chargers and USB-C adapters meet the emission limits of EN 55032:2015/A11:2020 (Class B for residential use, Class A for industrial environments) and the immunity requirements of EN 55035:2017/A11:2020 regardless of the switching technology used. The high switching frequency of GaN devices means that harmonic content from the switching waveform can directly fall within the EN 55032 conducted emission window (150 kHz–30 MHz), making adequate PCB layout, gate drive design, shielding, common-mode choke selection, and Y-capacitor placement critical design requirements to achieve compliance. [UNVERIFIED: specific GaN switching frequency ranges and EMI spectral behaviour vary by device manufacturer, topology, and operating point — the above ranges are indicative; consult device datasheets and application notes for product-specific EMI characterisation before test planning.]
summary.zh: 氮化镓（GaN）晶体管的开关频率（通常为100 kHz至数MHz）和dV/dt、dI/dt压摆率显著高于传统硅MOSFET，固有产生宽带传导和辐射EMI，其频率范围延伸至EN 55032测试窗口（传导：150 kHz至30 MHz；辐射：30 MHz至1 GHz）内。EU EMC指令2014/30/EU要求GaN快速充电器和USB-C适配器无论使用何种开关技术，均须满足EN 55032:2015/A11:2020的发射限值（住宅用途B级，工业环境A级）及EN 55035:2017/A11:2020的抗扰度要求。GaN器件的高开关频率使开关波形的谐波成分可直接落入EN 55032传导发射窗口（150 kHz–30 MHz），因此充分的PCB布局、栅极驱动设计、屏蔽、共模扼流圈选型及Y电容放置是实现合规的关键设计要求。【未经核实：具体GaN开关频率范围和EMI频谱特性因器件制造商、拓扑结构和工作点而异——上述范围仅供参考；在测试规划前请查阅器件数据手册和应用笔记以获取产品专项EMI特性数据。】
summary.zht: 氮化鎵（GaN）電晶體的開關頻率（通常為100 kHz至數MHz）和dV/dt、dI/dt壓擺率顯著高於傳統矽MOSFET，固有產生寬帶傳導和輻射EMI，其頻率範圍延伸至EN 55032測試窗口（傳導：150 kHz至30 MHz；輻射：30 MHz至1 GHz）內。EU EMC指令2014/30/EU要求GaN快速充電器和USB-C適配器無論使用何種開關技術，均須滿足EN 55032:2015/A11:2020的發射限值（住宅用途B級，工業環境A級）及EN 55035:2017/A11:2020的抗擾度要求。GaN器件的高開關頻率使開關波形的諧波成分可直接落入EN 55032傳導發射窗口（150 kHz–30 MHz），因此充分的PCB佈局、柵極驅動設計、屏蔽、共模扼流圈選型及Y電容放置是實現合規的關鍵設計要求。【未經核實：具體GaN開關頻率範圍和EMI頻譜特性因器件製造商、拓撲結構和工作點而異——上述範圍僅供參考；在測試規劃前請查閱器件數據手冊和應用筆記以獲取產品專項EMI特性數據。】

standards_or_laws: EN 55032:2015/A11:2020 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — Emission requirements; Class B conducted limits: 150 kHz–500 kHz quasi-peak 66 dBuV / average 56 dBuV; 500 kHz–30 MHz quasi-peak 60 dBuV / average 50 dBuV (based on CISPR 32:2015)
EN 55035:2017/A11:2020 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — Immunity requirements (based on CISPR 35:2016)

EN IEC 61000-3-2:2019/A1:2021 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (input current up to 16 A per phase; Class D limits apply to equipment with rated power up to 600 W with certain waveform characteristics)

summary.en: China does not have a GaN-technology-specific EMC standard. The same GB/T 9254.1-2021 (IDT CISPR 32:2015, recommended) and GB 4343.1-2009 (mandatory, CISPR 14-1:2005, for household appliance-category power supplies) emission limits apply to GaN chargers as to any other switched-mode power supply sold in China. The conducted emission measurement range under GB/T 9254.1-2021 is 150 kHz–30 MHz (same as CISPR 32), meaning GaN high-frequency switching harmonics fall within the same test window as in the EU. In practice, Chinese manufacturers seeking domestic CCC certification or voluntarily testing to GB/T 9254.1 face the same broadband EMI challenges from GaN switching as their EU-bound counterparts, but the CN framework lacks a mandatory harmonised-standards mechanism that universally compels CISPR 32-level testing for all product categories — enforcement depends on the certification scheme applicable to the product. [UNVERIFIED: whether mandatory GB 4343.1-2009 (CISPR 14-1:2005 base) or recommended GB/T 9254.1-2021 (CISPR 32:2015 base) applies as the primary CN EMC emission standard for a given GaN charger product depends on CN product classification — confirm with test laboratory before CN certification.]
summary.zh: 中国尚无针对GaN技术的专项EMC标准。适用于中国市场GaN充电器的发射限值与其他开关电源相同：GB/T 9254.1-2021（等同CISPR 32:2015，推荐性）和GB 4343.1-2009（强制性，基于CISPR 14-1:2005，适用于家用电器类电源）。GB/T 9254.1-2021的传导发射测量范围为150 kHz至30 MHz（与CISPR 32相同），意味着GaN高频开关谐波落入与欧盟相同的测试窗口内。实践中，寻求国内CCC认证或自愿按GB/T 9254.1检测的中国制造商面临与欧盟出口产品相同的GaN宽带EMI挑战，但中国框架缺乏强制所有产品类别进行CISPR 32级别测试的普遍强制协调标准机制——执行取决于产品适用的认证体系。【未经核实：对于特定GaN充电器产品，强制性GB 4343.1-2009（基于CISPR 14-1:2005）还是推荐性GB/T 9254.1-2021（基于CISPR 32:2015）作为主要中国EMC发射标准，取决于中国产品分类——须在中国认证前与检测实验室确认。】
summary.zht: 中國尚無針對GaN技術的專項EMC標準。適用於中國市場GaN充電器的發射限值與其他開關電源相同：GB/T 9254.1-2021（等同CISPR 32:2015，推薦性）和GB 4343.1-2009（強制性，基於CISPR 14-1:2005，適用於家用電器類電源）。GB/T 9254.1-2021的傳導發射測量範圍為150 kHz至30 MHz（與CISPR 32相同），意味著GaN高頻開關諧波落入與歐盟相同的測試窗口內。實踐中，尋求國內CCC認證或自願按GB/T 9254.1檢測的中國製造商面臨與歐盟出口產品相同的GaN寬帶EMI挑戰，但中國框架缺乏強制所有產品類別進行CISPR 32級別測試的普遍強制協調標準機制——執行取決於產品適用的認證體系。【未經核實：對於特定GaN充電器產品，強制性GB 4343.1-2009（基於CISPR 14-1:2005）還是推薦性GB/T 9254.1-2021（基於CISPR 32:2015）作為主要中國EMC發射標準，取決於中國產品分類——須在中國認證前與檢測實驗室確認。】

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — Emission requirements (recommended; IDT CISPR 32:2015; conducted measurement range 150 kHz–30 MHz)

GB 4343.1-2009 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household electrical appliances — Part 1: Emission (mandatory; based on CISPR 14-1:2005) [UNVERIFIED: applicability to GaN chargers depends on CN product classification]
GB 17625.1-2022 — Harmonic current emissions, up to 16 A per phase (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)

gap.en: The GaN EMI gap has two dimensions: (1) Technology-driven EMI spectrum gap — GaN switching harmonics (100 kHz to several MHz fundamental, with harmonics extending to 30 MHz and beyond) are entirely within the EN 55032 Class B conducted emission measurement window. Silicon MOSFET designs that passed EN 55032 Class B conducted testing may not be directly substitutable with GaN without re-testing, because GaN switching generates substantially more high-frequency content above 500 kHz where Class B quasi-peak limits are tighter (60 dBuV QP / 50 dBuV avg vs 66/56 dBuV below 500 kHz). Chinese manufacturers who qualified a silicon-MOSFET version for the EU market and then migrate to GaN must re-test the GaN variant for EU CE DoC re-issuance. (2) CN-to-EU framework re-issuance gap — a CN test report to GB/T 9254.1-2021 (even if technically equivalent in test method to EN 55032) cannot be re-used for an EU CE DoC. The EU DoC must cite EN 55032 and testing must be performed at an ILAC MRA-accredited laboratory recognised for this scope. Furthermore, some Chinese GaN charger manufacturers may hold test data only to GB 4343.1-2009 (CISPR 14-1 base), which uses different measurement methods and frequency ranges from CISPR 32 / EN 55032, making those reports even further from EU acceptance. [UNVERIFIED: specific dBuV figures above are from the CISPR 32 / EN 55032:2015 Class B table — verify exact limits from the current standard text before test planning, as amendment A11:2020 may have updated specific sub-ranges.]
gap.zh: GaN EMI差距具有两个维度：（1）技术驱动的EMI频谱差距——GaN开关谐波（基波100 kHz至数MHz，谐波延伸至30 MHz及以上）完全处于EN 55032 B级传导发射测量窗口内。通过EN 55032 B级传导测试的硅MOSFET设计，在切换至GaN时未必无需重新测试，因为GaN开关在500 kHz以上产生显著更多的高频成分，而该频段B级准峰值限值更严（60 dBuV QP / 50 dBuV avg，对比500 kHz以下的66/56 dBuV）。已为欧盟市场认证硅MOSFET版本后迁移至GaN的中国制造商，必须对GaN变体重新测试并重新签发EU CE符合性声明。（2）中国至欧盟框架重新签发差距——即便试验方法与EN 55032技术等效，按GB/T 9254.1-2021出具的中国检测报告不能用于EU CE符合性声明。EU符合性声明须引用EN 55032，且试验须在认可范围内的ILAC MRA认可实验室进行。此外，部分中国GaN充电器制造商可能仅持有GB 4343.1-2009（基于CISPR 14-1）的检测数据，其测量方法和频率范围与CISPR 32 / EN 55032不同，与EU验收要求差距更大。【未经核实：上述dBuV数值来自CISPR 32 / EN 55032:2015 B级表格——在测试规划前请对照当前标准文本核实精确限值，因A11:2020修订件可能更新了特定子频段。】
gap.zht: GaN EMI差距具有兩個維度：（1）技術驅動的EMI頻譜差距——GaN開關諧波（基波100 kHz至數MHz，諧波延伸至30 MHz及以上）完全處於EN 55032 B級傳導發射測量窗口內。通過EN 55032 B級傳導測試的矽MOSFET設計，在切換至GaN時未必無需重新測試，因為GaN開關在500 kHz以上產生顯著更多的高頻成分，而該頻段B級準峰值限值更嚴（60 dBuV QP / 50 dBuV avg，對比500 kHz以下的66/56 dBuV）。已為歐盟市場認證矽MOSFET版本後遷移至GaN的中國製造商，必須對GaN變體重新測試並重新簽發EU CE符合性聲明。（2）中國至歐盟框架重新簽發差距——即便試驗方法與EN 55032技術等效，按GB/T 9254.1-2021出具的中國檢測報告不能用於EU CE符合性聲明。EU符合性聲明須引用EN 55032，且試驗須在認可範圍內的ILAC MRA認可實驗室進行。此外，部分中國GaN充電器製造商可能僅持有GB 4343.1-2009（基於CISPR 14-1）的檢測數據，其測量方法和頻率範圍與CISPR 32 / EN 55032不同，與EU驗收要求差距更大。【未經核實：上述dBuV數值來自CISPR 32 / EN 55032:2015 B級表格——在測試規劃前請對照當前標準文本核實精確限值，因A11:2020修訂件可能更新了特定子頻段。】

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for CE marking under Directive 2014/30/EU. EN 55032 Class B limits are mandatory for residential-use multimedia equipment. Re-testing is required when switching topology changes (e.g., silicon to GaN) if the product identity in the Technical File changes materially.
mandatory_status.cn: No GaN-specific mandatory CN EMC standard exists. GB 17625.1-2022 is mandatory for harmonic emissions. GB/T 9254.1-2021 is recommended. GB 4343.1-2009 is mandatory for household appliance category products. CCC mandatory certification requirements depend on product classification. [UNVERIFIED: confirm applicable mandatory CN standard with test laboratory based on product category]

compliance_verdict.en: GaN charger manufacturers migrating from silicon MOSFET designs, or using GaN for the first time, must treat EU EMC testing as a fresh campaign: GaN high-frequency switching content falls directly in the EN 55032 conducted emission window (150 kHz–30 MHz) and Class B limits at frequencies above 500 kHz are tighter than at lower frequencies, making GaN designs inherently more EMI-challenging than silicon equivalents. Chinese manufacturers holding only CN domestic test reports (GB/T 9254.1, GB 4343.1, or harmonic-only GB series) cannot reuse those reports for EU CE marking — a full EN 55032 + EN 55035 + EN IEC 61000-3-2 test campaign at an ILAC MRA-accredited laboratory is required, together with a new EU DoC and Technical File. This comparison is informational only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 从硅MOSFET设计迁移至GaN，或首次使用GaN的充电器制造商，须将EU EMC测试视为全新检测活动：GaN高频开关成分直接落入EN 55032传导发射窗口（150 kHz–30 MHz），且500 kHz以上频段的B级限值比低频段更严，使GaN设计在EMI挑战方面固有地高于同类硅方案。仅持有中国国内检测报告（GB/T 9254.1、GB 4343.1或纯谐波GB系列）的中国制造商，无法将其复用于欧盟CE标志——须在ILAC MRA认可实验室开展完整的EN 55032 + EN 55035 + EN IEC 61000-3-2检测，并签发新EU符合性声明和技术文件。本比较仅供参考，不构成法律或监管建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 從矽MOSFET設計遷移至GaN，或首次使用GaN的充電器製造商，須將EU EMC測試視為全新檢測活動：GaN高頻開關成分直接落入EN 55032傳導發射窗口（150 kHz–30 MHz），且500 kHz以上頻段的B級限值比低頻段更嚴，使GaN設計在EMI挑戰方面固有地高於同類矽方案。僅持有中國國內檢測報告（GB/T 9254.1、GB 4343.1或純諧波GB系列）的中國製造商，無法將其複用於歐盟CE標誌——須在ILAC MRA認可實驗室開展完整的EN 55032 + EN 55035 + EN IEC 61000-3-2檢測，並簽發新EU符合性聲明和技術文件。本比較僅供參考，不構成法律或監管建議。
